Young relationships are thin, undifferentiated, and easily eroded, while mature relationships develop distinct 'horizons' -- a surface layer of daily interaction, a subsoil of shared meaning, and a bedrock of fundamental commitment. Relationship therapy that addresses only the surface horizon while ignoring the subsoil profile will fail, just as topsoil amendment without addressing compacted subsoil produces only temporary improvement.

name: Quasispecies Theory of Culinary Recipes
core_claim: Traditional recipes persist not as fixed formulas but as quasispecies clouds of variants maintained by the high mutation rate of home-cook improvisation. Selection acts on the cloud's mean palatability, not on any canonical version. When the mutation rate exceeds an error threshold (e.g., fusion cuisine pushes too many simultaneous substitutions), the recipe undergoes error catastrophe and fragments into unrecognizable dishes that lose cultural transmission fitness.

name: Bullwhip Effect Theory of Emotional Contagion
core_claim: Emotional signals in social hierarchies exhibit bullwhip amplification: a leader's mild frustration is interpreted and amplified at each organizational echelon, so that by the time it reaches front-line workers, the signal has been distorted into panic or rage. Each intermediary over-reacts to compensate for perceived information delay, producing emotional variance amplification structurally identical to supply-chain demand distortion.

name: Soil Formation Theory of Institutional Culture
core_claim: Organizational culture develops according to Jenny's CLORPT factors: Climate (industry conditions), Organisms (the people who pass through), Relief (hierarchical topology), Parent Material (founding values and initial structure), and Time. Culture is not designed but weathered into existence over decades, developing distinct 'horizons' (executive culture, middle-management culture, front-line culture) that can be read like a soil profile. Organizations younger than their cultural 'maturation time' lack differentiated horizons and remain culturally immature regardless of size.

name: Pin Tumbler Theory of Therapeutic Breakthrough
core_claim: Psychotherapeutic breakthroughs require sequential setting of psychological 'pins' in the correct order, analogous to lock-picking. Each pin represents a defense mechanism that must be gently elevated to its shear line (acknowledged without overwhelming the patient). The binding order — which defense yields first — is determined by the 'manufacturing tolerances' of the patient's psyche (some defenses are looser, more accessible). Attempting to set all pins simultaneously (confrontational therapy) produces a jam; skilled therapists feel for the binding pin through the 'tension wrench' of the therapeutic alliance.

name: Multi-Break Shell Theory of Pedagogical Scaffolding
core_claim: Effective lesson design follows multi-break shell choreography: a single launch (motivating question) must produce a timed sequence of conceptual bursts at different altitudes (abstraction levels), each igniting from the residual heat of the previous one. Shells that burst all at once (information dumps) produce momentary spectacle but no narrative arc. The choreographer's constraint — each break must be visually distinct yet thematically coherent — maps to the pedagogical requirement that each scaffolding level must introduce genuinely new structure while remaining connected to the preceding level. Failed lessons are squibs: shells that launch but never burst.

name: Diffraction and Edge Scattering Theory of Policy Spillover
core_claim: Government policies diffract around institutional obstacles just as sound waves diffract around physical barriers: a policy aimed at one sector (the direct sound field) bends into adjacent sectors (the shadow zone) through edge scattering at institutional boundaries. The degree of spillover is frequency-dependent — broad, low-frequency policies (macroeconomic stimulus) diffract widely into every sector, while narrow, high-frequency policies (targeted regulations) cast sharp shadows with minimal spillover. Policymakers who ignore diffraction consistently underestimate the reach of their interventions and are surprised by effects in sectors they never intended to affect.

name: Fourier Decomposition Theory of Personality Psychology
core_claim: Personality traits are the Fourier components of behavioral waveforms: any individual's complex behavioral pattern over time can be decomposed into a sum of orthogonal trait 'frequencies' (the Big Five or similar dimensional models), each with characteristic amplitude and phase. Low-frequency traits (neuroticism, conscientiousness) describe the broad contour of behavior across months and years; high-frequency traits (situational agreeableness, state extraversion) capture rapid fluctuations. The psychometric power spectrum of an individual reveals whether their personality is dominated by stable fundamentals or by high-frequency situational noise — a distinction invisible to single-timepoint assessments.

name: Glacial Surge Theory of Technological Disruption
core_claim: Technological disruptions follow glacial surge oscillation dynamics: long quiescent periods of incremental advance (normal glacial flow) alternate with sudden, catastrophic surges where the technology advances at 10-100x the normal rate. The surge is triggered when the basal drag (market friction, regulatory resistance, infrastructure lock-in) is suddenly reduced — by a lubricating layer of venture capital, a regulatory thaw, or an infrastructure buildout that eliminates the friction. Like glacial surges, technological surges terminate abruptly when the driving stress is dissipated (capital exhaustion, market saturation), leaving behind a deposit of disrupted industries (terminal moraine) and a landscape permanently altered by the passage.

name: Pointer Year Theory of Economic Leading Indicators
core_claim: Economic leading indicators should be identified through pointer year analysis borrowed from dendrochronology: rather than seeking variables that continuously correlate with future GDP, analysts should identify 'pointer years' — periods of extreme narrowing or widening in economic 'tree rings' (quarterly growth data) that are synchronous across multiple independent economic 'trees' (sectors, regions, asset classes). A pointer year signal is significant precisely because it appears simultaneously in series that are normally uncorrelated, indicating a forcing event (drought, frost) that overrides local conditions. The dendrochronologist's crossdating technique — sliding series against each other to find synchronous pointer years — can identify economic regime changes that composite indicators miss.

name: Cartographic Generalization Theory of Scientific Modeling
core_claim: All scientific models are cartographic generalizations: they must simplify (remove detail below a resolution threshold), smooth (eliminate noise), aggregate (merge similar entities), and exaggerate (amplify small but important features) in order to represent reality at a usable scale. The cartographic paradox — that a perfectly accurate map at 1:1 scale is useless — is identical to the modeling paradox that a simulation as complex as reality provides no explanatory leverage. The quality of a scientific model should be evaluated using the same criteria cartographers use: fitness for purpose at the intended scale of use.

name: Trophic Cascade Theory of Software Dependency Collapse
mechanism: Trophic cascades occur when the removal of a top predator triggers population explosions in herbivores, which then overgraze and collapse plant communities, fundamentally restructuring the ecosystem across multiple trophic levels
application: Software ecosystems experience trophic cascades when key maintainer-predators are removed. Top-level maintainers of critical dependencies act as apex predators — they control the population of feature requests and prevent overgrazing of the codebase by well-meaning contributors. When a key maintainer departs, contributor pull requests proliferate unchecked, feature bloat overgrows the architecture, and the foundational code health collapses. The left-pad incident was a trophic cascade triggered by predator removal.
prediction: Open-source projects that lose their primary maintainer without replacement will show a statistically significant spike in merged pull requests in the first 6 months followed by a measurable increase in bug reports and a decline in downstream dependent project health within 12-18 months, following the same temporal signature as ecological trophic cascades.

name: Stratigraphic Knowledge Layering
mechanism: stratigraphic superposition — younger layers deposit atop older ones, with unconformities marking gaps
application: Learning follows geological deposition: new knowledge layers settle on existing ones, and gaps in foundational understanding create unconformities that destabilize everything above. Diagnostic assessments should map a student's stratigraphic column, identifying unconformities (missing prerequisite knowledge) that explain surface-level failures in advanced topics.
prediction: Students whose prerequisite knowledge gaps (unconformities) are identified and remediated before advancing will show 20% higher retention of advanced material at 6-month follow-up compared to students who receive only forward-looking instruction.

name: Proprioceptive Code Review
mechanism: proprioception — the body's sense of its own position and movement without visual confirmation
application: Software systems lack proprioception: they have no internal sense of their own state beyond explicit monitoring. Building proprioceptive layers — lightweight internal models that continuously predict what the system's own outputs should be — enables self-diagnosis without external observation. When the proprioceptive prediction diverges from actual behavior, the system flags anomalies before users or monitors detect them.
prediction: Systems with proprioceptive anomaly detection (internal self-prediction layers) will detect production incidents a median of 8 minutes earlier than equivalent systems relying solely on external monitoring and alerting.

name: Iterated Prisoner's Dilemma in Gut Microbiome Stability
mechanism: In iterated prisoner's dilemma, tit-for-tat strategies dominate because repeated interactions allow cooperation to emerge through reciprocity, punishment, and memory of past encounters
application: Gut microbial communities maintain stability through iterated game-theoretic dynamics. Bacterial species that 'defect' (overconsuming shared nutrients, producing toxins) are punished in subsequent rounds through competitive exclusion by cooperative consortia. Antibiotic courses disrupt stability by resetting the iteration count to zero — eliminating the memory that sustained cooperation — allowing defector species (opportunistic pathogens) to dominate in the memoryless early rounds of recolonization.
prediction: Post-antibiotic microbiome recovery will show an initial defector-dominated phase (high pathogen relative abundance) lasting 3-8 weeks before cooperative consortia re-emerge, and this transition timing will correlate with the number of surviving 'memory' species (those present pre- and post-antibiotic) with r > 0.5.

name: Reef Nash Equilibrium
mechanism: Coral spawning synchrony where multiple species release gametes simultaneously to overwhelm predators
application: Multi-player coordination games can be solved using coral spawning logic: when individual actors cannot survive scrutiny alone, synchronized mass action overwhelms the capacity of opponents to respond. This differs from standard Nash equilibrium by introducing temporal saturation — the strategy isn't optimal in isolation but becomes dominant when enough players commit to the same moment. The mechanism explains flash crashes, viral movements, and coordinated regulatory arbitrage.
prediction: In repeated coordination games with predatory opponents, groups that synchronize actions into rare high-volume bursts will achieve higher cumulative payoffs than groups that distribute identical actions uniformly over time.

name: Dead Reckoning Morphogenesis
mechanism: Dead reckoning calculates current position by advancing a known position using estimated speed, heading, and elapsed time without external reference
application: Migrating cells during embryonic development navigate by dead reckoning — they compute their position from an initial known location using internally estimated speed and heading, accumulating positional error over distance. Morphogen gradients function not as GPS but as periodic position fixes that correct accumulated dead reckoning drift. This explains why long-range cell migration is noisier than short-range: dead reckoning error accumulates, and correction signals attenuate with distance.
prediction: Embryonic cells migrating beyond the effective range of morphogen gradient correction will show positional variance that increases quadratically with migration distance, matching the error accumulation profile of dead reckoning navigation.

name: Viticulture Terroir Framework for Software Development Ecosystems
mechanism: Terroir — the complete natural environment (soil, climate, topography, microbiome) in which a grape variety is cultivated, producing distinctive and irreproducible characteristics in the resulting wine
application: Software projects express terroir: the same programming language and architecture (grape variety) produces fundamentally different software when developed in different organizational environments. The terroir includes team culture (soil), market pressure (climate), organizational hierarchy (topography), and the existing tool ecosystem (microbiome). This explains why attempts to replicate successful software projects in different organizations consistently produce different results despite identical technical specifications.
prediction: Controlling for programming language, architecture, and team size, software quality metrics will cluster by organizational environment factors (team tenure, communication patterns, deployment infrastructure) rather than by technical choices, explaining more than 40% of quality variance.

name: Taphonomic Bias Framework for Venture Capital Portfolio Epistemics
mechanism: Taphonomy studies the differential preservation of organisms from death to fossilization: hard-shelled, mineralizing organisms in low-energy depositional environments are vastly overrepresented in the fossil record relative to their true abundance, while soft-bodied organisms in high-energy environments are systematically absent; paleontological inference that ignores taphonomic bias produces systematically wrong pictures of past biodiversity.
application: Venture capital deal flow suffers from structural taphonomic bias: companies that survive long enough to be visible to investors — those with legible business models, warm network introductions, and pitch-deck-compatible narratives — are preserved in the 'investment record' while non-legible innovations (informal, community-embedded, non-scalable-by-design ventures) are systematically absent. Portfolio diversification strategies built on visible deal flow thus reconstruct a biased sample, overweighting 'hard-shelled' VC-adapted ventures. Taphonomic correction requires deliberate sampling of the soft-bodied record: non-networked founders, non-English pitch materials, revenue-generating businesses that never sought funding.
prediction: VC funds that implement systematic 'taphonomic correction' sourcing strategies (defined as >25% of deal flow from non-warm-introduction, non-accelerator channels) will show higher variance in returns but a fatter right tail — specifically, a higher rate of 10x+ outcomes per fund — than matched funds using conventional sourcing, testable across fund vintage cohorts.

name: Coin Hoarding, Demonetization, and Lexical Withdrawal from Active Circulation
mechanism: Coin hoards form when economic or political instability causes currency to be withdrawn from circulation into private storage; numismatists distinguish between coins that drop out of circulation through hoarding versus those demonetized by deliberate policy, because the two processes leave different archaeological signatures.
application: Dying languages show analogous withdrawal patterns: words and grammatical forms first move from active productive use into passive recognition (hoarding — speakers understand but no longer generate), then into specialist or ceremonial preservation (numismatic collection — used only in controlled contexts by specialists), and finally into documentary record only (museum pieces — no living users). The numismatic distinction between hoarding and demonetization maps onto the difference between organic language contraction (community gradually stops using forms) and deliberate language suppression (colonial or institutional policy explicitly bans usage). This framework predicts that hoard-type withdrawal produces different revitalization prospects than demonetization-type withdrawal, because passively retained lexical items can re-enter circulation under changed conditions while deliberately suppressed items may require active reconstruction.
prediction: Language revitalization programs targeting lexical items in the 'passive recognition' stage (measurable via comprehension-without-production testing in elder speakers) will achieve active reintroduction in community speech at higher rates than programs targeting items already in specialist-only or documentary-only stages, with the success differential increasing with the age gap between the youngest passive recognizers and the revitalization program participants.

name: Semantic Field Cross-Reference Recommender Architecture
mechanism: Lexicographers organize vocabulary into semantic fields — clusters of words sharing a conceptual domain — and construct explicit cross-reference networks linking near-synonyms, antonyms, hyponyms, and associatively related terms. Thesaural structure captures not just similarity but the type and directional nature of lexical relationships.
application: Recommendation systems typically model user preferences as proximity in an embedding space, collapsing all relational types into a single similarity metric. Adopting lexicographic semantic-field architecture would mean distinguishing relationship types explicitly: hyponymic relations (user likes jazz → recommend a jazz subgenre) differ structurally from antonymic relations (user dislikes country → this is not simply the opposite of liking jazz) and associative relations (user likes jazz → recommend jazz-adjacent films). Implementing typed relational graphs rather than uniform embedding similarity would allow recommendation explanations grounded in named relationship types, improving both accuracy and transparency.
prediction: A recommendation system using typed relational graphs derived from semantic-field architecture will outperform a cosine-similarity-based embedding baseline on serendipity metrics — recommendations rated as surprising yet satisfying — particularly in domains with rich hierarchical category structure such as music and literature.

name: Stick-Slip Friction Learning Plateau Model
mechanism: Stick-slip friction occurs when two surfaces in contact alternately bond at microscopic asperity contact points (stick phase, no macroscopic movement) and then release suddenly when stored elastic energy exceeds the static friction threshold (slip phase, rapid movement), producing characteristic jerky motion rather than smooth progression.
application: Skill acquisition plateaus are tribologically analogous: a learner's performance 'sticks' as cognitive and procedural schema consolidate at a new level of complexity, with no observable improvement despite continued practice — elastic potential accumulating at the substrate of tacit understanding. The subsequent breakthrough (slip phase) appears sudden and discontinuous but was preceded by substantial sub-perceptual restructuring. Instructional interventions applied during the stick phase that increase 'normal force' (challenge, complexity, cognitive load) can lower the static friction threshold and accelerate the slip transition.
prediction: Learners in plateau phases who receive increased task complexity interventions (higher normal force) rather than remediation or repetition-of-prior-material interventions will show faster breakthrough to the next performance level, with the magnitude of the subsequent performance jump correlating with plateau duration.

name: Speleothem Stratigraphic Method for Legacy Codebase Archaeology
mechanism: Cave formations (speleothems) record environmental history in layered mineral deposits whose thickness, isotopic composition, and inclusion content encode past climate, hydrology, and external contamination events. Speleologists drill micro-cores and read these layers to reconstruct sequences of change that surface records never captured.
application: Legacy codebases accumulate analogous strata: deprecated APIs entombed by compatibility shims, schema migrations fossilized in column naming conventions, and security patches that calcified over original vulnerabilities. Treating the codebase as a speleothem—drilling through abstraction layers via diff archaeology, dependency graph analysis, and dead-code isotope tracing—allows engineers to reconstruct the sequence of architectural decisions that produced the current formation. This stratigraphic reading reveals which layers are load-bearing (removal would cause collapse) versus which are mere calcite crusts (removable without structural consequence), reframing refactoring as careful excavation rather than demolition.
prediction: Teams that perform explicit stratigraphic mapping of legacy codebases before refactoring will introduce fewer regression defects per thousand lines changed than teams that proceed without stratigraphic analysis, because they correctly identify load-bearing versus decorative layers prior to removal.

name: Bivouac Bridge Traffic Protocol
mechanism: Army ant columns construct living bridges by having workers anchor themselves at bottleneck points, holding their bodies as structural elements while the colony flows over them; bridge dimensions self-regulate to the point where the traffic benefit of widening is offset by the cost of removing worker-ants from productive foraging.
application: Urban traffic networks can be redesigned using bivouac bridge logic: instead of fixed-geometry lane configurations, certain nodes (on-ramps, merge points, interchange connectors) are staffed by adaptive infrastructure — variable lane markings, movable barriers, signal agents — that widen or contract based on real-time throughput optimization rather than static peak-flow estimates. The army ant model predicts a specific equilibrium width for each bottleneck as a function of colony (city) size and resource gradient, giving traffic engineers a theoretical target rather than a heuristic one. Crucially, the model also specifies when NOT to widen: bridges that are too wide relative to foraging returns cause net colony loss, analogous to induced demand degrading overall network efficiency.
prediction: Adaptive merge-point control systems designed to reach the ant-predicted equilibrium width — closing lanes when marginal throughput gain drops below worker-maintenance cost equivalent — will reduce induced-demand overshoot by a measurable factor compared to conventional demand-responsive widening.

name: Call-and-Response Therapeutic Dialogue Protocol
mechanism: Call-and-response is a musical form found across West African, blues, gospel, and field-holler traditions in which a leader's phrase (call) is structurally completed or answered by a group or second voice (response), creating a dyadic antiphonal loop that regulates participation, validates utterances, and co-constructs meaning through timed reciprocity. The form encodes social repair: an unanswered call is culturally marked as a rupture.
application: Psychotherapeutic dialogue, particularly in person-centered and relational psychoanalytic traditions, operates as a call-and-response system in which the therapist's reflective response is not merely content-paraphrasing but a timed, tonally calibrated completion that validates the patient's call and invites elaboration. Ethnomusicological analysis of response timing, tonal matching, and phrase-length mirroring provides a formal grammar for what therapists learn intuitively: that a response arriving too quickly (before the call resolves) is as damaging as silence, and that tonal mismatch (warm call, flat response) constitutes a therapeutic rupture equivalent to an off-key response in song. Training programs could use call-and-response musical exercises to develop therapists' attunement before clinical placement.
prediction: Therapists trained in structured call-and-response musical improvisation exercises will score higher on observer-rated attunement scales (response timing accuracy, tonal matching) in subsequent therapy session transcripts compared to a control group receiving equivalent training hours in verbal reflection techniques.

name: Watchmaking Escapement Mechanism for Democratic Deliberation
mechanism: Escapement — the mechanism that converts continuous energy (mainspring) into regulated discrete ticks by alternately locking and releasing the gear train, preventing the energy from discharging all at once
application: Democratic deliberation needs an escapement mechanism to convert the continuous energy of public opinion into regulated discrete policy actions. Without an escapement, populist energy discharges all at once (mob rule). Overly restrictive escapements (excessive bureaucracy) slow the mechanism to uselessness. The optimal escapement allows exactly one 'tick' of policy change per deliberation cycle, maintaining constitutional tempo.
prediction: Democracies with institutional structures that enforce mandatory cooling-off periods between proposal and vote (functioning as escapements) will show lower policy reversal rates than democracies that allow immediate floor votes on new proposals.

name: Shipbuilding Watertight Compartmentalization for Microservice Architecture
mechanism: Watertight compartmentalization — ships are divided into independent watertight compartments so that a hull breach floods only the breached compartment; the ship remains buoyant as long as flooding doesn't exceed the reserved buoyancy distributed across intact compartments
application: Microservice architectures should adopt naval compartmentalization standards rather than simple service isolation. Each service should have a defined 'flooding capacity' (maximum resource consumption before automatic bulkhead closure), and the overall system should maintain 'reserve buoyancy' (spare capacity distributed across healthy services). The naval insight is that compartment size matters — too few large compartments and a single breach sinks the ship; too many small compartments and the structural overhead of bulkheads weakens the hull.
prediction: Microservice systems designed with explicit flooding-capacity limits and distributed reserve capacity will maintain availability during cascade failures 2x longer than systems with simple circuit-breaker patterns alone.

name: Forensic Toolmark Analysis for Identifying Ghostwriters
mechanism: Toolmark analysis — every tool (gun barrel, screwdriver, knife) leaves unique microscopic marks on surfaces it contacts, created by manufacturing defects and wear patterns unique to that individual tool; marks can be matched to the specific tool that made them
application: Every writer leaves 'toolmarks' in their prose — microscopic stylistic patterns created by their unique cognitive manufacturing process and worn into habitual grooves through practice. Ghostwritten texts can be identified not by content analysis but by toolmark comparison: matching the characteristic micro-patterns of sentence construction, clause ordering, and punctuation rhythm to a known writer's 'barrel striations.' These marks persist even when a writer deliberately tries to imitate another's style.
prediction: A stylometric system modeled on forensic toolmark analysis (comparing micro-patterns of syntax rather than word frequency) will achieve higher ghostwriter identification accuracy than current stylometric approaches, particularly when the ghostwriter has deliberately attempted to match the attributed author's style.

name: Theological Apophatic Method for Requirements Elicitation
mechanism: Apophatic theology (via negativa) — defining God by what God is not, since positive statements about infinite being are always inadequate; 'God is not finite, not material, not comprehensible' progressively triangulates the divine nature
application: Software requirements should be gathered apophatically — by systematically asking stakeholders what the system should NOT do, rather than what it should do. Stakeholders are notoriously poor at articulating positive requirements but excellent at identifying what they hate in existing systems. The apophatic method triangulates the desired system by progressively eliminating what it is not. The resulting 'negative requirements space' constrains the solution more precisely than positive requirements ever could.
prediction: Requirements gathered through structured negative elicitation ('what should this system never do?') will produce software with higher user satisfaction scores than requirements gathered through traditional positive elicitation ('what should this system do?'), in a controlled comparison study.

name: Primatological Tactical Deception for Cybersecurity Honeypot Design
mechanism: Tactical deception in primates — chimpanzees and other great apes deliberately mislead competitors about food locations, suppress food calls when rivals are present, and lead rivals away from food before doubling back; the deception is calibrated to the specific rival's knowledge state
application: Cybersecurity honeypots should adopt primate tactical deception rather than static traps. Current honeypots are fixed decoys; primatological honeypots would actively mislead attackers, suppress 'food calls' (valuable-looking data) when the attacker is near real assets, and lead the attacker away from sensitive systems before the defender 'doubles back' to monitor. Critically, the deception should be calibrated to the specific attacker's knowledge state — showing different false information to attackers who have different levels of network reconnaissance.
prediction: Adaptive honeypots that calibrate deceptive responses to individual attacker reconnaissance depth (primatological deception) will maintain attacker engagement 3x longer and extract more attacker technique intelligence than static honeypots.

name: Winemaking Assemblage for Ensemble Machine Learning
mechanism: Assemblage (blending) — the art of combining wines from different grape varieties, vineyards, and vintages to create a final blend that is superior to any component; the blender tastes hundreds of combinations and selects the ratio that achieves balance, complexity, and consistency
application: Ensemble machine learning methods are assemblage, but they lack the winemaker's art. Current ensemble methods (bagging, boosting, stacking) combine models mechanically. A winemaking-inspired approach would involve 'tasting' model combinations for qualitative properties beyond accuracy — balance (performance across different data segments), complexity (capturing subtle patterns no single model detects), and consistency (robustness across vintages/time periods). The assemblage metaphor suggests that the blending ratio is as important as the component models.
prediction: Ensemble methods that optimize blending ratios for balance and consistency metrics (cross-segment and cross-temporal performance) in addition to accuracy will outperform accuracy-only-optimized ensembles on out-of-distribution test sets.

name: Primatological Dunbar Number Layering for Social Network Feature Design
mechanism: Dunbar's number layers — primatological research shows humans maintain relationships in nested layers: ~5 intimate, ~15 close, ~50 friends, ~150 meaningful contacts; each layer requires progressively less interaction frequency but each has cognitive limits tied to neocortex size
application: Social networks should enforce Dunbar layering rather than flat connection models. A social platform that restricts intimate-level interactions (direct messages, close-friends stories) to ~5 contacts, frequent-interaction features to ~15, regular-feed visibility to ~50, and notification-worthy activity to ~150 would produce healthier social behavior than platforms that treat all 2000+ 'friends' as a flat list. The primatological insight is that these limits are neurological, not cultural — violating them produces social stress regardless of platform design.
prediction: Social networks that implement Dunbar-layered interaction restrictions (limiting high-bandwidth features to inner circles) will show lower user anxiety scores and higher relationship satisfaction than platforms with flat connection models, even though users initially resist the restrictions.

name: Aeronautical Coffin Corner for Enterprise Architecture Decision-Making
mechanism: Coffin corner — at very high altitudes, the margin between stall speed (too slow) and critical Mach number (too fast) narrows until they converge; the aircraft has almost zero speed margin, and any turbulence can push it into either stall or Mach buffet
application: Mature enterprise architectures reach a coffin corner. As system complexity increases (altitude), the margin between 'too slow to change' (stall speed — legacy drag prevents adaptation) and 'too fast to be stable' (critical Mach — change velocity creates destructive shock waves through the system) narrows. At sufficient complexity, any external perturbation (market shift, regulatory change) pushes the architecture into either stall (can't respond) or Mach buffet (changes propagate destructively). The only escape is to descend — deliberately reduce complexity.
prediction: Enterprise systems whose complexity metrics exceed a threshold (coffin corner entry) will experience a sharp increase in the rate of change-related incidents, as the margin between stall (inability to change) and destructive change narrows, identifiable by converging metrics of change velocity limits and technical debt drag.

name: Spine and Signature
mechanism: In sewn binding, individual signatures (folded page gatherings) are stitched to each other and to a spine; the binding's durability comes from distributed load-sharing across signatures rather than a single adhesive joint
application: Deep neural networks with single large dense layers are perfect-bound books — strong but brittle, failing catastrophically when one region is damaged. Architectures organized as modular signature-like blocks (residual units, capsules, attention heads) sewn together through skip connections share representational load across units, improving robustness to localized weight damage or pruning. The spine corresponds to the residual stream or embedding space that runs through all signatures without being owned by any one.
prediction: Neural networks with explicit modular signature structures and inter-module stitching connections will retain a greater fraction of task performance after random unit ablation compared to monolithic architectures matched for total parameter count.

name: Sump and Surface
mechanism: Cave divers must plan for a point of no return — once past a sump, surface access is severed and the diver must commit to finding an exit within the cave system; the decision to pass a sump requires knowing whether air supply is sufficient for exploration plus return from the worst-case exit point
application: Startup pivots have sump moments: points at which the company has committed resources (runway, team composition, customer relationships) such that return to the prior model is no longer viable. Founders who do not recognize sump thresholds enter pivots without calculating whether remaining resources are sufficient to reach the new exit. A cave-diving pivot framework demands explicit identification of sump points — minimum viable conditions under which forward commitment is survivable — before crossing them.
prediction: Startups that explicitly identify and document resource sump thresholds before initiating pivots will exhibit lower post-pivot runway-exhaustion rates than startups that pivot without formal minimum-viability-forward calculations.

name: Spice Route Immune Grammar
mechanism: entrepôt processing as signal amplification and re-export
application: Historical spice trade relied on entrepôt ports — middlemen who aggregated, processed, and redistributed goods between producers and consumers, extracting value and adding information (provenance certification, blending). Lymph nodes function as immunological entrepôts: they aggregate antigenic signals from peripheral tissues, process and amplify them through clonal selection, and re-export calibrated immune responses. Just as entrepôt failure (blockade, plague) disrupted both supply and information flow, lymph node dysfunction disrupts both signal amplification and immune memory consolidation.
prediction: Disruption of lymph node architecture (through fibrosis or surgical removal) will impair not just local immune response magnitude but the fidelity of antigen-specific memory encoding, resulting in measurably lower antibody affinity maturation relative to intact lymph node controls — analogous to entrepôt blockades degrading provenance information.

name: Mordant Sentiment Binding
mechanism: mordant chemistry determining dye uptake permanence and color fidelity
application: Natural dyes do not bond permanently to wool without a mordant — a metallic salt that binds to both fiber and dye molecule, bridging them. Without mordant, color is surface-deposited and fades rapidly; with mordant, it penetrates and becomes structurally part of the fiber. Sentiment analysis models trained on raw text (no mordant) capture surface emotional tone that is context-sensitive and rapidly obsolete. Models that incorporate structural mordants — long-range semantic context, speaker identity, platform affordance, community norms — show sentiment that is fiber-deep: stable, transferable, and resistant to adversarial surface rewording.
prediction: Sentiment classifiers augmented with mordant features (speaker history, platform context, community semantic norms) will maintain accuracy on adversarially reworded inputs at a significantly higher rate than classifiers trained on surface text features alone, because surface dye fades under adversarial washing while mordanted sentiment is structurally bound.

name: Warp-and-Weft Ciphers
mechanism: Silk weaving encodes pattern through the interlacing of warp (vertical, structural) and weft (horizontal, variable) threads; pattern emerges only at the intersection; a single thread examined in isolation reveals nothing of the design; the fabric's strength depends on balanced tension across both axes
application: Cryptographic protocols can adopt the warp-and-weft model: warp threads represent persistent structural keys (long-term identity material) and weft threads represent ephemeral session tokens; security emerges only at their intersection — neither axis alone is meaningful. Protocol designers balance warp tension (key rotation cadence) against weft tension (session duration) so that fabric integrity holds even when individual weft threads are compromised. The visible pattern — the ciphertext — reveals nothing about either thread type independently.
prediction: Authentication protocols designed with explicit warp-weft key separation — where structural identity keys and ephemeral session tokens are mathematically independent and neither can reconstruct the other — will show lower lateral-movement success rates in red-team exercises compared to protocols using a unified key hierarchy.

name: Queen Cell Succession
mechanism: Queen cells are produced from genetically identical worker larvae but are fed exclusively royal jelly, which epigenetically activates a different developmental pathway; the colony prepares multiple queen cells simultaneously, allowing natural selection between viable queens before one emerges and the others are suppressed or swarm
application: Succession planning borrows the queen-cell model: multiple succession candidates are drawn from the same organizational gene pool but are placed in differentiated developmental environments (distinct leadership rotations, challenge assignments, mentorship pairings) that epigenetically activate different leadership phenotypes from equivalent raw material. The organization prepares parallel developmental cells and observes emergent phenotype before committing to a single successor, rather than pre-selecting based on larval traits.
prediction: Organizations using parallel developmental succession tracks — where multiple candidates receive differentiated assignments simultaneously and successor selection occurs after observable phenotype differentiation — will show higher five-year post-succession performance retention compared to organizations using sequential high-potential programs with pre-selected single successors.

name: Mineral Buffer Affect Theory
mechanism: Volcanic hot springs maintain stable pH despite continuous acid input through mineral buffering: dissolved carbonates and silicates absorb proton load, keeping the system in a dynamic equilibrium that resists acute perturbation without eliminating responsiveness.
application: Emotional regulation can be modeled as a buffering capacity problem rather than a suppression problem: psychologically resilient individuals maintain affective equilibrium not by preventing emotional responses but by having sufficient cognitive and social mineral reserves that absorb acute emotional load without pH collapse. Therapeutic interventions that build buffering capacity (social connection, meaning-making frameworks, somatic resources) outperform those that attempt to reduce emotional input. The model also predicts buffer depletion: chronic stress exhausts reserves just as sustained acid input eventually overwhelms spring chemistry.
prediction: Individuals with higher measured social support and cognitive reappraisal repertoires will show smaller cortisol AUC responses to standardized laboratory stressors than individuals with equivalent trait neuroticism but lower buffering resources, with buffering capacity mediating rather than moderating the stress response.

name: Desert Varnish Brand Age
mechanism: Desert varnish is a microbiologically-mediated manganese and iron oxide coating that accumulates on rock surfaces over millennia — it cannot be artificially accelerated, it records environmental history in its layering, and its presence signals surface stability and antiquity in ways that observers recognize even without conscious analysis.
application: Brand patina functions as a cultural equivalent of desert varnish: it accumulates through consistent environmental exposure over time and cannot be accelerated or manufactured without producing instantly recognizable counterfeits. Brands that attempt to simulate heritage through visual retrodesign or origin mythology fail in the same way fake varnish fails — trained observers detect the absence of actual layering. The actionable implication is that brand authenticity investment has the longest time horizon of any brand activity and the most asymmetric return profile: real patina appreciates indefinitely, while manufactured patina erodes rapidly under scrutiny.
prediction: Consumer goods brands with genuine operational histories exceeding 50 years will show higher willingness-to-pay premiums in blind attribution tests than brands with similar visual heritage signals but shorter actual histories, with the premium largest among consumers who have domain expertise in the category.

name: Taphole Stakeholder Flow
mechanism: maple sap flows when freeze-thaw pressure differentials drive sap from roots upward past the tap hole; over-tapping or tapping too early depletes the tree's starch reserves and reduces future yield — sustainable extraction requires matching tap count to trunk diameter and allowing full seasonal recovery
application: Stakeholder value extraction (dividends, data monetization, labor intensity, community resource use) follows maple tap logic: extraction is driven by pressure differentials (investor expectations, competitive pressure) and is sustainable only when limited by trunk diameter (organizational carrying capacity) with full seasonal recovery built in. Over-tapping manifests as talent burnout, community backlash, or asset depletion. The mechanism predicts that extraction schedules should be calibrated to organizational diameter (headcount, cash flow) and include mandatory recovery periods, not optimized to pressure differentials alone.
prediction: Organizations that explicitly model stakeholder extraction limits as a function of organizational capacity metrics (analogous to trunk diameter rules) and build mandatory recovery cycles into extraction planning will show higher 10-year stakeholder value totals than extraction-optimized peers, despite lower annual extraction rates.

name: Retreat Line Strategy
mechanism: glacier retreat mapping tracks the terminus position over time, distinguishing seasonal advance from long-term recession, and identifies which valleys retain ice longest due to elevation, aspect, and accumulation zone size — retreat is not uniform and strategic ice retention in favorable terrain preserves the glacier's regenerative potential
application: Market contraction strategy typically treats retreat as uniform surrender. Glacier mapping logic demands terrain analysis: which market segments retain favorable conditions (high elevation — premium, defensible), which have productive accumulation zones (loyal customer bases that recharge revenue), and which valleys are exposed to maximum ablation (competitive heat, margin pressure). Retreat should be managed by strategic concentration in favorable terrain rather than uniform withdrawal, preserving regenerative potential in the accumulation zone so advance is possible when conditions change.
prediction: Companies executing market contraction by systematically concentrating resources in highest-margin, highest-loyalty segments (favorable terrain) rather than proportional across-the-board cuts will preserve revenue base more effectively and show faster recovery when conditions improve, measurable in revenue trajectory data for companies contracting during demand shocks.

name: Critical Differentiation Theory
core_claim: Cell fate commitment operates as a bona fide phase transition in gene-expression state space, where signaling gradients tune cells to a critical point at which free-energy minimization selects one stable attractor from a symmetry-broken manifold.

mapped_components.unit: Individual cell; cell-cell signaling plays the role of nearest-neighbor coupling
mapped_components.variation: Stochastic fluctuations in gene expression across uncommitted progenitors, analogous to local order-parameter fluctuations near criticality
mapped_components.selection: Morphogen gradients act as external field and temperature control, tuning the free-energy landscape so the pluripotent state becomes unstable at a critical concentration
mapped_components.fitness: Tissue-level order parameter — spatial coherence of correctly differentiated cell types, analogous to magnetization
mapped_components.boundary: Developmental window maps to quench protocol; tissue geometry shifts the universality class

falsifiable_predictions: Near commitment, variance and spatial correlation length of lineage markers should diverge following power-law scaling with dimension-dependent critical exponents — 2D epithelia should show Ising-class exponents (nu ≈ 1, gamma ≈ 7/4), 3D organoids mean-field (nu = 0.5, gamma = 1).

Slowing the signaling-gradient ramp should reduce mis-specified cells following Kibble-Zurek scaling: defect density ~ tau_quench^(-d·nu/(1+z·nu)), testable by comparing fast vs slow differentiation protocols in stem-cell organoids.

name: MycelialRank: Adaptive Nutrient-Flow Page Ranking
core_claim: Web page authority is better modeled as an adaptive resource-routing network where link pathways strengthen or atrophy based on user-traffic gradients, rather than as a static stationary distribution over a fixed graph.

mapped_components.unit: Web page as hyphal node — a routing junction that both consumes attention and transmits it downstream via outlinks
mapped_components.variation: Link pathways undergo growth (new links), fusion (hub pages merging traffic), and pruning (zero-traffic links decay toward zero weight)
mapped_components.selection: User click-through streams act as nutrient gradients — pathways carrying more traffic get reinforced with higher edge weight
mapped_components.fitness: Throughput centrality: rank proportional to attention-nutrient routed to downstream pages, rewarding connective hubs over dead-end prestige sinks
mapped_components.boundary: Topical coherence of link neighborhood (analogous to soil chemistry); presence of high-utility destination pages (host availability)

falsifiable_predictions: MycelialRank will assign higher scores to high-throughput connector pages compared to classic PageRank, and these will show lower pogo-stick rate when surfaced in search results.

Link pruning via exponential decay for zero-click links over 90 days will produce higher NDCG@10 on navigational queries versus equally-weighted PageRank, by eliminating spam and stale authority inflation.

name: Swarm Multiplier Economics
core_claim: Fiscal stimulus propagates through local spending-interaction rules among heterogeneous agents, producing emergent amplification patterns that can exceed or fall short of the classical Keynesian multiplier depending on the topology of agent spending networks.

mapped_components.unit: Individual economic agent (household, firm) following simple local spending rules based on neighbor signals
mapped_components.variation: Heterogeneous response thresholds, spending triggers, and neighbor connectivity, analogous to ant pheromone sensitivity variation
mapped_components.selection: Global demand amplification emerges from local cascades: agents spend when enough neighbors signal increased activity, creating chain reactions
mapped_components.fitness: Emergent multiplier — ratio of total output change to initial injection — now varies by injection point in the network
mapped_components.boundary: Local information only; no central coordination; slack capacity; stable network topology over stimulus period

falsifiable_predictions: Stimulus injected into densely-connected clusters (urban cores, tight supply chains) will produce 15-40% higher realized multiplier than equivalent stimulus into sparse regions, even controlling for MPC differences.

Below a critical connectivity threshold, stimulus cascades will fail to propagate and the multiplier collapses discontinuously (phase transition) rather than declining smoothly — testable via regions hit by supply-chain disruptions.

name: Epistatic Strategy Recombination Theory
core_claim: When game strategies are encoded as modular sub-components (like genes), recombination produces composite strategies unreachable by payoff-gradient search — the ecology exhibits punctuated equilibria, epistasis, and neutral drift networks.

name: Compartmental Threshold Dynamics (CTD)
core_claim: Social adoption passes through a latent 'Primed' compartment — individuals who exceeded their threshold cognitively but haven't adopted behaviorally — with a decay-back mechanism producing bistability absent from standard models.

name: Surplus-Value Equilibrium Theory
core_claim: Capital accumulation follows equilibrium logic where surplus value extracted from labor and demand for reinvestable capital clear at an endogenous accumulation rate. Crises arise from persistent disequilibria between surplus generation and profitable reinvestment.

name: Hyphal Actor-Network Theory (HANT)
core_claim: Social networks self-organize via mycelial logic: actors extend associative 'hyphae' toward resource gradients, fuse via translation, and prune weak links. Network durability is a function of throughput, not structural stability.

name: Dialectical Hypostatics
core_claim: Every theological God-world claim contains an antithesis between ontological orders (uncreated/created). Genuine doctrinal development occurs only when a conciliar act produces a hypostatic synthesis holding both in unconfused, undivided union — the Chalcedonian pattern as universal grammar.

name: Antifragile Gene Regulatory Networks
core_claim: GRNs repeatedly exposed to transcriptional noise don't merely tolerate it — they reconfigure their attractor landscape to expand the repertoire of stable expression states, gaining regulatory fitness from disorder.

name: Wu Wei Reinforcement Learning (WWRL)
core_claim: An RL agent that minimizes policy-dynamics divergence alongside reward converges faster and generalizes better, because aligned actions exploit the MDP's natural transition structure rather than fighting it.

name: Strategic Hormesis
core_claim: Firms that absorb small competitive shocks within a narrow intensity window activate adaptive capabilities that produce greater long-term resilience than shielded firms — too little threat breeds complacency, too much triggers death spiral.

name: Epidemiological Occupancy Threshold Model
core_claim: Disease transmission in structured populations follows dose-response dynamics where the effective reproductive number depends not just on contact rate but on a threshold occupancy of susceptibles in spatial compartments — below a critical local density, transmission stalls even when aggregate R0 exceeds 1.

name: Pedogenic Fermentation Selection Model
core_claim: Soil formation proceeds through microbial fermentation-like stages where organic matter is transformed by sequential metabolic guilds, each conditioning the substrate for the next — and the fitness of a soil horizon is its capacity to sustain this metabolic relay across wet-dry cycles.

name: Doctrinal Attachment Theory
core_claim: Judicial systems form 'internal working models' of legal reasoning through early formative precedents, and the responsiveness pattern of higher courts to lower court decisions determines the long-term coherence and stability of an entire doctrinal lineage — mirroring how caregiver responsiveness shapes an infant's relational blueprint.

mapped_components.unit: Higher court–lower court dyad, where the higher court's treatment of early appeals forms the relational template
mapped_components.variation: Responsiveness patterns: secure (consistent engagement), avoidant (dismissal without guidance), anxious-ambivalent (erratic reversals)
mapped_components.selection: Internal working model crystallizes from early landmark cases; subsequent courts default to the interpretive posture established in formative precedents
mapped_components.fitness: Long-term doctrinal coherence — securely attached precedent relationships produce stable law; avoidant/ambivalent ones produce fragmented doctrine
mapped_components.boundary: Critical period in the first generation of cases after a new statute or constitutional provision

falsifiable_predictions: Doctrinal areas with substantive early appellate engagement will show higher citation coherence and lower inter-circuit split rates.
Reforms outside the critical period require disproportionately more judicial effort (en banc hearings, Supreme Court intervention).
Jurisdictions with avoidant early appellate patterns show higher rates of legislative override attempts.

name: CapacityRank
core_claim: Road segments can be ranked by congestion-inducing potential using a PageRank-like stationary distribution over route flows; high-CapacityRank segments are where adding capacity most strongly attracts latent demand and restores equilibrium congestion, because they sit at convergence points of many probable commuter chains.

mapped_components.unit: Road segment as node; commuter route-choice as the random surfer
mapped_components.variation: Traffic inflows from adjacent segments weighted by capacity attractiveness
mapped_components.selection: Stationary distribution of a random commuter following capacity-weighted routes with damping
mapped_components.fitness: CapacityRank score predicting how much latent demand a capacity expansion will unlock
mapped_components.boundary: Directed road network at Wardrop user-equilibrium

falsifiable_predictions: Top-decile CapacityRank segments show smaller long-run travel-time improvements when expanded.
CapacityRank ordering correlates (r > 0.5) with empirical induced-demand elasticities, outperforming betweenness centrality.
Removing high-CapacityRank segments reduces system-wide travel time (Braess paradox); removing low ones increases it.

name: Prospect Virtue Theory
core_claim: Character traits are evaluated relative to a moral reference point, with systematic asymmetries: the motivational weight of perceived virtue-deficits is roughly twice that of equivalent virtue-gains, and rare moral exemplars are overweighted while common moderate goodness is underweighted in shaping dispositions.

mapped_components.unit: Character trait evaluated as displacement from a moral reference point
mapped_components.variation: Dispositions framed as gains or losses relative to the reference, producing different motivational force
mapped_components.selection: Practical wisdom operates under distortion: moral losses weighted ~2x more than gains; low-probability extremes overweighted
mapped_components.fitness: Subjective eudaimonia is reference-dependent with diminishing sensitivity
mapped_components.boundary: Community of practice sets and shifts the moral reference point

falsifiable_predictions: Avoiding-vice framing produces ~2x the behavioral change effort compared to acquiring-virtue framing.
Community transitions cause temporary moral motivation spikes that decay as reference points recalibrate.
Agents disproportionately alter habits in response to rare moral saints/monsters vs. moderate peers.

name: Autopoietic Dissipation
core_claim: Dissipative structures persist not merely because they maximize entropy production, but because a subset achieve organizational closure — their constituent processes regenerate the flow-network that sustains them — and only these self-producing dissipative structures are selected for long-term stability far from equilibrium.

mapped_components.unit: Coupled set of irreversible processes that collectively reproduce conditions for their own continuation
mapped_components.variation: Random fluctuations generating candidate process-networks of different topologies
mapped_components.selection: Only fluctuations nucleating organizationally closed networks persist; open-loop patterns decay
mapped_components.fitness: Robustness of self-production under perturbation, not instantaneous entropy production rate
mapped_components.boundary: Thermodynamic gradient interface the structure actively maintains

falsifiable_predictions: Higher organizational closure predicts longer persistence and greater perturbation tolerance, independent of entropy production rate.
Self-producing dissipative structures show discontinuous failure modes rather than gradual degradation.
Greater catalytic closure allows spontaneous structure formation at lower distances from equilibrium.

name: Tectonic Dissonance Theory
core_claim: When plates are forced into mechanically incompatible configurations, the system experiences 'tectonic dissonance' resolved through strategies analogous to cognitive dissonance reduction: change one plate's behavior, add a buffering microplate, or diffuse deformation across a broad zone.

mapped_components.unit: Plate boundary segment carrying a kinematic 'commitment' (velocity, rheology, buoyancy)
mapped_components.variation: Convection forces generating incompatible boundary conditions between adjacent segments
mapped_components.selection: Dissonance-reduction: subduction reversal, microplate creation, or diffuse deformation zone
mapped_components.fitness: Dissonance magnitude proportional to boundary importance × geometric inconsistency
mapped_components.boundary: Finite spherical surface where all motions are coupled — one plate's change cascades to neighbors

falsifiable_predictions: Unstable triple junctions reorganize more frequently and produce more microplates than stable ones.
Continental collisions preferentially resolve via terrane accretion (add consonant element strategy).
Major plate reorganizations are preceded by rising global geometric mismatch indices.

name: Cognitive Queue Architecture
core_claim: Queueing systems achieve optimal throughput when jobs are chunked and routed through parallel type-specialized buffers with a centralized dispatcher, mirroring Baddeley's working memory model with its phonological loop, visuospatial sketchpad, and central executive.

mapped_components.unit: Job decomposed into processing chunks fitting within a server's capacity window
mapped_components.variation: Parallel specialized buffers (compute-intensive, I/O-bound, mixed) instead of one undifferentiated queue
mapped_components.selection: Central executive dispatcher dynamically shifts capacity to most saturated buffer
mapped_components.fitness: Aggregate buffer utilization across all parallel queues
mapped_components.boundary: Hard per-buffer capacity cap (~4 concurrent jobs) beyond which temporal decay degrades performance

falsifiable_predictions: Multi-queue + dynamic dispatcher beats single-queue only when job types are heterogeneous.
Per-buffer cap of ~4 concurrent jobs reduces latency vs uncapped, due to context-switching overhead.
Dispatcher overload degrades system even with spare buffer capacity (central executive bottleneck).

name: Identity-Driven Speciation Theory
core_claim: Speciation in peripheral isolates is accelerated by a mechanism analogous to in-group/out-group categorization: small populations rapidly develop phenotypic 'distinctiveness markers' driving assortative mating, reinforcing reproductive isolation before geographic barriers solidify.

mapped_components.unit: Peripheral isolate's collective gene pool as a 'self-concept' defined against the parent population
mapped_components.variation: Phenotypic divergence creating recognizable in-group markers (mating calls, plumage, chemical signals)
mapped_components.selection: Positive distinctiveness — preferential mating with novel-trait bearers, selecting against hybridization
mapped_components.fitness: Species longevity; strong identity markers resist reabsorption upon secondary contact
mapped_components.boundary: Minimal isolation suffices — weak barriers trigger rapid differentiation once assortative mating begins

falsifiable_predictions: Isolates with early conspicuous divergence achieve reproductive isolation faster than those diverging via drift alone.
Punctuated-origin species show stronger conspecific mate preference than gradually-diverged species.
Traits under strongest divergent selection are recognition/signaling traits, not ecological adaptations.

name: Learned Market Helplessness
core_claim: Prolonged uncontrollable market losses produce generalized investor passivity — participants fail to buy even when fundamentals are favorable, sustaining persistent undervaluation. The explanatory style investors adopt (permanent/pervasive vs temporary/specific) determines recovery speed.

mapped_components.unit: Investor behavioral posture — action-readiness shaped by prior uncontrollable losses
mapped_components.variation: Explanatory style: pessimistic (permanent, pervasive, personal) vs optimistic (temporary, specific, external)
mapped_components.selection: Repeated uncontrollable events reinforce action-futility association, generalizing to controllable contexts
mapped_components.fitness: Behavioral activation vs passivity; market-level recovery speed toward fundamentals
mapped_components.boundary: Perceived uncontrollability, not actual; trusted hedging tools immunize against helplessness

falsifiable_predictions: After clustered shocks, retail participation declines more than institutional, persisting 18+ months past fundamental recovery signals.
Pessimistic-explanatory-style investors underperform optimistic ones by measurable margin in 24 months post-trough.
Controllability cues (circuit breakers, loss-limit tools) accelerate recovery among retail but not institutional participants.

name: Distributed Weathering Effect
core_claim: Soils subjected to episodic, spaced weathering events develop more mature horizons and higher fertility than continuously weathered soils of equal cumulative intensity, because each resumed episode rebuilds degraded reaction fronts — mirroring how spaced retrieval strengthens memory traces.

mapped_components.unit: Weathering front within a developing horizon, analogous to a memory trace
mapped_components.variation: Temporal distribution of weathering episodes — continuous vs spaced cycles
mapped_components.selection: Each resumed episode reactivates passivated surfaces and reopens microfractures more effectively than continuous exposure
mapped_components.fitness: Horizon differentiation, clay translocation, nutrient cycling capacity
mapped_components.boundary: Sufficient initial mineral reactivity; intervals not so long that cementation blocks reactivation

falsifiable_predictions: Spaced wetting-drying cycles produce greater clay neoformation than continuous moisture at equal cumulative water input.
Mediterranean/monsoonal climates show faster profile development per unit precipitation than equatorial constant-rain climates.
Moderate freeze-thaw frequency (30-60 cycles/year) produces deepest weathering fronts — inverted-U relationship.

name: Red Queen Congestion Hypothesis
core_claim: Urban transport exhibits coevolutionary arms races between capacity expansion and demand generation — each investment selects for behavioral counter-adaptations restoring equilibrium congestion, making static capacity solutions as futile as asexual reproduction against evolving parasites.

mapped_components.unit: Road-segment / mode-corridor pair locked in interaction with its latent demand population
mapped_components.variation: Arms race: planners (capacity, tolls, transit) vs commuters (route arbitrage, mode shift, relocation)
mapped_components.selection: Frequency-dependent: underused capacity attracts demand until equilibrium returns
mapped_components.fitness: Effective travel time at equilibrium — constant despite investment (running to stay in place)
mapped_components.boundary: Requires intimate land-use/transport coupling; breaks where demand is inelastic

falsifiable_predictions: Cities with higher modal diversity show lower variance in corridor-level congestion over time.
Time to return to pre-expansion congestion inversely proportional to land-use zoning flexibility.
Unpredictable congestion pricing suppresses induced demand longer than fixed-rate pricing.

name: Computational Friction Theory
core_claim: As algorithms scale, accumulated implementation frictions (cache misses, GC pauses, branch mispredictions, I/O variance) degrade theoretical tractability — only simple robust designs maintain complexity-class guarantees in practice, mirroring how Clausewitzian friction degrades ideal military plans.

mapped_components.unit: Algorithm-problem pair in a friction-laden execution environment
mapped_components.variation: Cache misses, floating-point drift, GC pauses, memory fragmentation, constant-factor overhead
mapped_components.selection: Simple robust algorithms survive deployment; brittle-optimal ones are abandoned despite better big-O
mapped_components.fitness: Gap between theoretical complexity class and observed wall-clock tractability
mapped_components.boundary: Fog of computation — unknown input distributions, unpredictable system load, opaque hardware

falsifiable_predictions: Higher implementation complexity → larger observed-to-theoretical runtime ratio as input grows.
Simple heuristics outperform theoretically superior algorithms more often under increased system friction.
A measurable friction threshold exists beyond which theoretical optimizations yield zero practical speedup.

name: Trophic Diffusion of Responsibility
core_claim: As functionally redundant species within a trophic level increases, each species' per-capita regulatory effect on adjacent levels diminishes — weakening cascade strength exactly as each bystander's felt obligation decreases with group size.

mapped_components.unit: Species within a trophic level, each a potential 'helper' regulating adjacent levels
mapped_components.variation: Number of functionally redundant species sharing the same trophic role
mapped_components.selection: Diffusion of regulatory effort — per-capita consumption pressure drops as guild richness increases
mapped_components.fitness: Trophic cascade strength: biomass change transmitted across levels
mapped_components.boundary: Requires functional redundancy and ecological ambiguity; breaks with keystone dominance

falsifiable_predictions: Higher-richness predator guilds show lower per-capita prey consumption at same total biomass.
Removing one species from low-richness guild produces stronger cascade disruption than from high-richness guild.
High dietary overlap correlates with weaker cascades per unit predator biomass.

name: Fractal Prolongation Theory
core_claim: Tonal music exhibits strict self-similarity across Schenkerian layers — the same prolongational operations (neighbor, passing, arpeggiation) generate each level from the one below, following a single recursive rule whose iteration depth determines surface complexity, measurable by a fractal-like elaboration dimension.

mapped_components.unit: Prolongational span — structural tone + its elaborating events at a given hierarchical level
mapped_components.variation: Recursive application of generating rule: same operations at each iteration level
mapped_components.selection: Scale-invariant prolongation — voice-leading operations at background reappear at foreground
mapped_components.fitness: Fractal prolongational dimension measuring hierarchical complexity and branching uniformity
mapped_components.boundary: Tonal harmonic language constrains the generating rule; ~4-6 levels of audible hierarchy

falsifiable_predictions: Branching ratio of prolongational spans converges to a characteristic constant within a style period.
Prolongational dimension predicts listener coherence ratings — pieces near style-mean rated most coherent.
Operation-type distributions are statistically indistinguishable across Schenkerian levels within a piece.

name: Cognitive Compilation Theory
core_claim: Compiler optimization restructured as iterative distortion-detection — each IR statement is an 'automatic thought' with possible cognitive distortions (catastrophizing = excessive error paths, overgeneralization = missed specialization), and optimization passes are Socratic questioning testing statements against evidence.

mapped_components.unit: IR statement as automatic thought — may or may not be well-adapted to context
mapped_components.variation: Code distortions: catastrophizing (excessive checks), black-and-white (no partial eval), overgeneralization (unnecessary polymorphism)
mapped_components.selection: Multi-pass analysis as Socratic questioning — liveness, constant propagation, PGO each test against evidence
mapped_components.fitness: Reduction in computational maladaptation: fewer instructions, lower latency, eliminated dead code
mapped_components.boundary: Requires metacognitive capacity (static analysis infra); dynamic languages need runtime 'therapy' (JIT)

falsifiable_predictions: Distortion-taxonomy pass ordering achieves equivalent optimization with fewer total passes.
CBT-inspired hierarchical ordering outperforms random pass scheduling for multi-distortion code regions.
PGO disproportionately benefits code with high 'overgeneralization' distortion scores.

name: Regulatory Contact Trace Theory
core_claim: Every regulatory interaction between a transcription factor and target gene leaves a detectable molecular trace (epigenetic marks, chromatin remodeling), and the evidentiary value for reconstructing network topology is proportional to trace rarity × persistence — mirroring forensic contact traces.

mapped_components.unit: Regulatory contact event: TF engaging a cis-regulatory element
mapped_components.variation: Trace types: histone marks, methylation, pioneer footprints, cofactor residues
mapped_components.selection: Every contact leaves a trace; detection depends on assay sensitivity
mapped_components.fitness: Evidentiary value = trace rarity × persistence for network reconstruction
mapped_components.boundary: Detection sensitivity floor; highly connected hubs create 'contaminated scenes'

falsifiable_predictions: Rare-TF-regulated genes retain more distinct epigenetic signatures than hub-gene targets.
Transient TF binding leaves decaying chromatin traces with quantifiable half-lives.
Trace-rarity-weighted GRN inference outperforms unweighted approaches against gold standards.

name: Relational Tension Theory of Network Stability
core_claim: Actor-networks stabilize or fracture based on relational tension distribution — overtightened connections (coercion) snap, undertightened ones (disengagement) slip, and only balanced tension produces durable assemblages, mirroring how fabric integrity depends on even thread tension.

mapped_components.unit: Actor as thread; warp = incumbent structural actors, weft = newly enrolled cross-cutting actors
mapped_components.variation: Tension = asymmetric demands during translation; varies by power differentials and enrollment cost
mapped_components.selection: Balanced tension → stable flexible assemblage; imbalanced → overtightened snap or undertightened slip
mapped_components.fitness: Network durability — capacity to maintain coherent action across heterogeneous actors over time
mapped_components.boundary: Actor material/semiotic properties limit tension tolerance; institutional scaffolding constrains configurations

falsifiable_predictions: Networks with concentrated obligatory passage points are more brittle upon that actor's defection.
Coercive enrollment produces 'puckering' — tight core clustering with peripheral detachment.
Tension-balancing interventions increase network longevity vs unbalanced growth.

name: Two-Process Model of Economic Cycle Regulation
core_claim: GDP is governed by two independent processes: homeostatic spending pressure (Process E, accumulates during contraction) and a structural oscillator (Process K, ~7-10yr credit/policy cycle). Recessions trigger when E falls below K's threshold; performance peaks when E and K are in phase.

mapped_components.unit: Aggregate output as 'arousal state' — high GDP = economic wakefulness, recession = sleep
mapped_components.variation: Process E (pent-up demand/savings accumulating) + Process K (credit cycle oscillator, ~7-10yr)
mapped_components.selection: Recession when E falls below K threshold; recovery when E rebuilds above it
mapped_components.fitness: GDP maximized when E and K are in phase; misalignment → stagflation or jobless recovery
mapped_components.boundary: MPC determines E accumulation rate; central bank policy acts as 'light exposure' phase-shifting K

falsifiable_predictions: Prolonged expansions without savings buildup produce deeper recessions when K contracts.
Counter-cyclical stimulus is most effective early in K's contractionary phase.
Higher-MPC nations exhibit shorter, more frequent cycles with smaller amplitude.

name: Inclusive Fitness Theory of Open Source
core_claim: Developers invest disproportionate effort in open source when 'relatedness' (shared dependency graph, employer, ecosystem) × benefit to recipients > cost — mirroring Hamilton's rB > C rule for eusocial altruism.

mapped_components.unit: Developer as organism with finite time contributing to projects
mapped_components.variation: Relatedness = shared org, dependency proximity, ecosystem overlap, personal use
mapped_components.selection: Contributions sustained when r × B > C; developers triage toward high-r projects
mapped_components.fitness: Inclusive fitness = direct career gains + Σ(r_i × B_i) across downstream beneficiaries
mapped_components.boundary: Requires kin recognition — visible dependency graphs, community channels, employer signals

falsifiable_predictions: Projects where contributors are direct users sustain higher per-capita contribution rates.
Contribution intensity correlates with dependency proximity (1-hop > 2-hop).
Loss of community infrastructure causes contribution collapse disproportionate to quality changes.
Corporate OSS programs show eusocial 'worker caste' patterns: high effort, low defection, fork suppression.

name: Stellar Prepotency Theory
core_claim: Stars follow a strict hierarchical fusion sequence mirroring Maslow's prepotency: each burning stage is a 'need level' that must be exhausted before the next activates, with stellar self-actualization defined as maximum nucleosynthetic complexity permitted by mass.

mapped_components.unit: Star as motivated system 'seeking' equilibrium through sequential fusion
mapped_components.variation: Five fusion levels: H-burning (physiological), He (safety), C/Ne (belonging), O/Si (esteem), supernova r-process (self-actualization)
mapped_components.selection: Prepotency: lighter fuel must be exhausted and core must contract to next Coulomb barrier threshold
mapped_components.fitness: Maximum nucleosynthetic complexity achieved — supernova = full self-actualization
mapped_components.boundary: Initial mass determines highest accessible level, like environmental constraints in Maslow

falsifiable_predictions: No star ignites heavier fusion while significant lighter fuel remains in core (strict prepotency).
Peak stellar 'flourishing' (longevity × element diversity) at intermediate mass ~8-25 solar masses.
Binary-stripped stars show truncated nucleosynthetic output vs isolated stars of same initial mass.

name: Immune Reciprocity Theory
core_claim: Immune clonal selection operates as a gift economy: APCs 'gift' antigen to lymphocytes creating reciprocal obligation to mount effector response. Non-reciprocation = anergy (social death). System coherence requires continuous signal circulation — hoarding (sequestration) destroys integrity.

mapped_components.unit: Costimulatory exchange event between APC and lymphocyte
mapped_components.variation: Immediate reciprocity (innate), deferred (adaptive clonal expansion), generalized (bystander/trained immunity)
mapped_components.selection: Triple obligation: give (APCs present), receive (lymphocytes engage), reciprocate (effector differentiation)
mapped_components.fitness: Affinity maturation as status through generosity — highest reciprocators gain highest affinity
mapped_components.boundary: Self-tolerance as hoarding prohibition; autoimmunity = gift economy collapse
